title: Segfault while trying to prepare a malformed window-function query
description:
drh added on 2020-04-03 11:45:52:
Henry Liu of Shenzhen Ankki Technologies Co.Ltd. sends in the following SQL
snippet that causes a segfault while preparing.
<blockquuote>
CREATE TABLE a(b, c);
SELECT c FROM a GROUP BY c
    HAVING(SELECT(sum(b) OVER(ORDER BY b),
                  sum(b) OVER(PARTITION BY min(DISTINCT c), c ORDER BY b)));
This query has caused problems ever since support for window functions
was added on 2018-06-30 (version 3.25.0).  The problem expressed as an
assertion fault up until check-in [712e47714863a8ed] (2019-08-10) at which
point it began to segfault.
key_bug_features: Malformed window-function query preparation causes segfault
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE a(b INTEGER, c TEXT NOT NULL);
INSERT INTO a(b, c) VALUES (1, 'test'), (NULL, 'example'), (3, NULL);
CREATE TABLE b(x REAL, y INTEGER);
SELECT c FROM a GROUP BY c HAVING (SELECT SUM(b) OVER (ORDER BY b), SUM(b) OVER (PARTITION BY MIN(DISTINCT c), c ORDER BY b));
